Partnerships
Partnership is a vital question mark for a businessman. Partnership,
if beneficial and profitable. can make the person concerned progress
and expand quickty. achieve the aims and ambitions of his ife and attain
the heights which it is not possible for him to reach alone without
partnership. Partnership. however. is seldom benefidal and profitable to
each and eve.
